text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I won the autumn Tenno Sho! I really<n>beat my two
top oshis!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But I never would have made it here<n>if it weren't
for my trainer and all the<n>Umamusume I raced
along the way...<n>Oh, my feelings are out of control.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I can't take much more. I love<n>everyone shooo
mush, I'm losing the<n>vocabulary to describe it—no,
wait!<n>I've got one last thing to say!
